empty.title: No bots
empty.description: No bots found for the selected filters

reason.label: Reason
reason.placeholder: The bot did not respect our Terms of Service

sure.label: Are you sure?
sure.description: Please confirm that you know what you're doing and that the action will be immediate.
sure.descriptionIrreversible: Please confirm that you know what you're doing and that the action will be immediate and irreversible.

editLimits.title: Editing {username}... | Editing {count} bots...
editLimits.description: You can update here the limits of {username}. | You can update here the limits of the selected bots.
editLimits.toast: Limits successfully updated for the selected bots.

suspend.title: Suspending {username}... | Suspending {count} bots...
suspend.description: You're about to suspend {username} which means it won't be able to send stats and its dashboard will be unavailable for the owner and the teammates. | You're about to suspend the selected bots which means they won't be able to send stats and their dashboards will be unavailable for the owners and the teammates.
suspend.toast: The selected bots have been successfully suspended.

delete.title: Delete {username}... | Delete {count} bots...
delete.description: You're about to delete {username} which means all associated data will be permanently deleted from the database. | You're about to delete the selected bots which means all associated data will be permanently deleted from the database.
delete.toast: The selected bots have been successfully deleted.
